summary: Hydrated live state leaves #61970 as the only open candidate and the best surviving canonical issue for the WhatsApp outbound video delivery report. #59174 was listed as an open candidate in the local gitcrawl inventory but is already closed in live state and tracks a different inbound quoted-image media path, so no close/comment/label mutation is planned.

actions.reason: #61970 remains the best live canonical issue. It should stay open for maintainer/product follow-up because the reported outbound video failure is not proven fixed, not a high-confidence duplicate of the closed context items, and this job cannot open a fix PR.
Already closed in live state and related rather than duplicate of the surviving outbound-video canonical issue.
